title: Tidy Text Mining with R
description: A practical introduction to text mining in R using the tidytext package and tidy data principles, covering sentiment analysis, tf-idf, n-grams, topic modelling, and document-term matrices. Demonstrates how familiar data wrangling tools like dplyr and tidyr can be applied to natural language, with real-world case studies using Twitter, NASA datasets, and Usenet archives.
subject: general
